title: Anchor Memory Requirements
summary: Product requirements for Anchor's memory system: storing conversations as evidence, extracting and recalling facts, and correcting, updating, or deleting memory.
notes: Located under docs/requirements/ with numbered requirements MR-001..MR-015, each followed by 'Acceptance criteria' and user-facing 'The User must be able to...' language. Strong PRD signals (acceptance criteria, user stories, goals from a user perspective); no Decision/Consequences sections and no API/schema contracts, so not ADR or SPEC. No outbound markdown links or filename mentions found, so cross_refs is empty.
